statement: Pulse combines traffic, conversion, revenue, AI-source, uptime, and agent-report views in one analytics product.
evidence: Implemented dashboard and report routes plus repository tests for analytics, funnels, uptime, AI providers, daily briefs, and agent access.

statement: The first-party Pulse tracker does not set visitor cookies by default and respects Do Not Track.
evidence: public/t.js implements cookie-free visit identifiers and Do Not Track handling; tracking tests cover ingestion behavior.

statement: Self-managed and hosted Pulse access are private-preview options with no public purchase or fixed-price offer.
evidence: The pricing surface presents invitation-only evaluation options and no checkout, fixed price, public source, or registration call to action.

statement: Pulse does not publish a reusable demo account; evaluation access is invitation-only.
evidence: The noindex preview notice contains no credentials, registration link, purchase link, or public preview-request contact.
